case_title: BUTLER, FRED D. VS PEREZ, MORRIS AKA PEREZ, RUDY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY BUTLER, FRED D. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, MORRIS AKA PEREZ, RUDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, MORRIS AKA PEREZ, RUDY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTLER, FRED D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, MORRIS AKA PEREZ, RUDY $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $852.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-11-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-08-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $700. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
